rfps.title: RFP - Cybersecurity Risk Assessment
rfps.reason: 3ie requires a CISA-certified cybersecurity risk assessment firm specializing in penetration testing and security audits; Dhwani is an ICT4D software company without cybersecurity audit or CISA certification credentials.
